title: iw oss CLI + DB persistence for OSS compliance workflow

steps.description: Database: Alembic migration + ORM models (Project.oss_enabled + oss_scan / oss_finding / oss_tool_run tables)
Code review: S01 (migration correctness, FK / index / enum alignment, reversible downgrade, ORM conventions)
Backend: orch/oss/ service module (scanner, persistence, tool_probe, config_writer)
Code review: S03 (subprocess hygiene, persistence atomicity, pill_color correctness, error paths)
Backend CLI: orch/cli/oss_commands.py with 7 subcommands (install/scan/prepare/publish/enable/disable/status) + register in main.py
Code review: S05 (CLI patterns match existing groups, exit codes, --json shape stability, error messaging)
Tests: boundary + freshness + invariant integration tests (test_oss_boundary.py, test_oss_freshness.py)
Code review: S07 (Boundary Behavior and Invariant coverage, testcontainer compliance, red-before-green evidence)
Final cross-step review: AC coverage, layer consistency, no regressions, CLAUDE.md compliance
